query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

3.description: select high-risk quick-clay polygons (filtered by class from step 2)

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: find buildings that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance) to handle multiple polygon matches

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%' LIMIT 1;
SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier;

SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredkvalkartlegging, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS bbox_wkt FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IN ('3','4') AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%' LIMIT 1)) = true LIMIT 100;
